reviews.review_description: I redownloaded yesterday months after initial install. I guess the game is dead bc there were 0 servers and no ability to create one. When i clicked the buttons in the ui they did nothing. So save your money.

reviews.review_title: Exactly the game I dreamed of for VR!
reviews.review_description:
I do not know how this game is not being advertised! It is awesome: 32 vs 32, helicopters (fighter and transport), trucks, tanks, quad bikes, and airplanes. I am trying to convince three friends to buy the Quest, and they decided to do so after seeing this game.

As others have mentioned, people keep talking about Forefront without realizing that this game exists. From what I have seen in the trailers of Forefront, WarDust feels more milsim vibe instead of the Battle Royale style of it.

As of 26.08.2025, I have only encountered one significant bug, which is remarkable considering it is still in Early Access. Even when you cannot fill all 64 player slots (which is understandably challenging for a VR title), the bots are not dumb, allowing you to make plans and put real effort into developing strategies with your squad to win.

The helicopters and airplanes have a kind of exotic way of controlling, which demands some practicing for being a pro, but allows newbies to fly as well. At the beginning I hate it once I like flight simulators. But now I think it is the good balance that allows to have specialized pilots really doing cool stuffs, some occasional helicopter pilots according to the opportunity while other players can prefer to keep in the ground as infantry.

People really do not understand the concept of Early Access. Does the game have some UI issues in the menus that will surely be fixed? Yes! But once you start a match, you feel the adrenaline of war battle: the chaos of helicopters, tanks, and 64 players (with plenty of bots for now, since it was just released) all running and shooting.

Five months ago, the only standalone game for Quest in this style was Contractors, which had only 16 players online and as a fast-paced fells more like a Counter Strike. WarDust suddenly comes in with 64-player matches, a nice variety of vehicles, and the future improvements since it is still in Alpha.

If I could, I would give it 10 stars. I consider the best current shooting game by far!

reviews.review_title: Now this is some amazing VR Warfare!
reviews.review_description:
For some reason the game just keeps getting better the more I play it.

Battlefield for VR, with some amazing gameplay. This truly is fun! Amazing mechanics, vehicles, challenging diverse maps.. I love it! 

Like jumping into my own action movie 🤯. 

And there’s more to come 🥰

reviews.review_title: Game could have been fun but 0 players
reviews.review_description: Hate leaving negative reviews but this game has a player base of 0

So i play this game a lot on steam. There arent the most players but i can get in and shoot some bots and have fun. Just found out about the quest version and immediately purchased. So what are my thoughts?

Good: the game works. Its not perfect but its playable once in a match. The graphics are serviceable, the vehicles look fine, and the sound is ok. Everything seems to be just ok and i give that a pass because in the end its 32 v 32 large scale battlefield in vr with vehicles and bots that arent running into walls.

Bad: the vehicle controls are fine but the camera angles are terrible. The constantly shifting left and right as you turn. The reticle doesn’t seem to be the most accurate, and theres nowhere way way to shift vehicle controls. The ui is terrible because the toggleable options dont show what their setting are. There also doesnt seem to be a way to start a match with custom settings. You have to have a modded map to play a custom server so you cant play with the official maps.  There also doesnt seem to be an option to play offline with the bots. If games couldnt fill on pc theres no way theyre going to fill on quest. I wouldnt mind playing offline but playing online just doesnt work after finishing one match. I just cant get back in.

Can we play offline? Can we play on official maps? Add those 2 options and ill gladly add 2 stars.

The scar H loadout dosent load and the sig spawns in the size of the empire state building. Can you please fix these bugs so the weapons are usable . Other than that, great game. Its battlefield for vr. Edit. The mk12 dosent load

reviews.review_title: The only game of its kind
reviews.review_description: There simply aren't any vr games out quite like this one. Multiple vehicles, plenty of weapon options, plays like old school starwars battlefront, but in a modern warfare atmosphere. A truly great addition to anyone who enjoys shooters' library. If you're on the fence about it just get it. It's a hidden gem worth every penny.
The helicopters always turn upside down and it won't show any servers do not recommend read this before buying.
Learn how to make actual helicopters and jets, not just moving your hands. No one online, dum mods, will be getting a refund

For the price of the game it should be a lot better I need a refund this game is probably one of the worst games for its price. The game has very bad graphics and there are little to no players online. I need my money back

reviews.review_title: OK I LUV THIS WITH A PASSION
reviews.review_description: Man, please somehow advertise this and make it more known, rn people know bout forefront, the upcoming "bfvr" game, but we already have one right here, Just figure out today you ported a slightly different but extremely fun version to quest, I played this till my headset died lol. I would love for more updates to drop with hoping you can add stuff like in the pcvr version like transports and destruction, and hopefully/eventually, some updated graphics for this quest version. Again love it, don't stop work on this please, I will definitely be coming back to this (oh and those heli controls with the "flappy bird" styled flight, so smooth, don't change it please :D   )

This game is so amazing. There are tons of guns, attachments, weapon, skins and it has large maps and awesome vehicles. This is a must-have, especially if you like VR shooters. The only thing holding this game down is not having enough players so if you are looking into getting this game GET IT.
Love the game just wanting to throw out that your sig rifle is humongous and big as the map love the game

reviews.review_title: Just as much fun as pc
reviews.review_description: After reading the reviews I almost didn't buy it since I have it on pcvr and thought this was going to be a crappy rip off of what that was. I think it's just as good if not better in some aspects.. it's made for the quest controllers not rift.  Very small difference but noticeable I don't have to click in the stick every now and then to move and haven't had any lag issues I had two other players in the first match and I think it was all bots the next two matches so it could use a higher player count online with that said its actually kida hard to tell bots from other players on here unlike most you can pretty much tell right away

This game is in EARLY ACCESS, most people don't seem to know what that means.
Whilst this game only has 2 levels right now and needs a number of improvements, its still a very playable and fun game.
It's true theirs no player base right now, I've only ran into about 10 people in 2 days of playing, but this game has tons of potential, improve the graphics, the vehicle handling, add 8 more maps.
This is like Battlefield in VR, I look forward to seeing more updates.

I give it a 5 stars becouse the game is very intense in battles , I got the Steam version and now the Standalone version,i hope the developers don't stop here and continue  to updated the Standalone version

reviews.review_title: Fun but wouldn’t get it right now.
reviews.review_description: This game is very fun but the player base is dead. Barely anyone is on but that’s because no one really talks about it. Personally the price is way too high for what it is right now. When the player base goes up then I’d recommend it.
It's battlefield!!! Needs work but great bones and still getting  updates. Worth it now!!!
Poorly maintained, crashes often, bad performance, forced boring complex tutorial, BAD all around. REGRET

reviews.review_title: My favorite VR game has come to Quest!
reviews.review_description:
I have been addicted to War Dust on the PC for years. I can't believe how it plays just as well on standalone even in early access. The updates have been frequent and it keeps getting better. I can't find any other game nearly as fun.
-
UPDATE 1/30/25: Most of the fun addictive gameplay for me that was also in the original War Dust has very recently changed or been removed in War Dust Storm in an attempt to improve the game. Hopefully future updates will bring some of that back.

The games not bad, but it’s not good either. The graphics are ok. But it lied about having 64 players in each server, which isn’t true. 90% of servers are full of bots, which make the game easy. But not fun either, did get a few laughs in after watching two men get run over by a jet, and if you saw, a player, you probably didn’t. This games kinda dead..
Im getting a bit of Battlefield vibe.

reviews.review_title: Hopefully will continue to get better
reviews.review_description:
I've played this a lot and find it very entertaining. I also agree with the various gripes about it. Lack of real players is the big one but I also have to say that the bots are actually quite amazing and deadly. Bottom line for me is a kudos to the developer for how far he's brought this and that he'll continue to improve it. For us players, we need patience and to enjoy it for what it is right now.

Why did you remove the comms? As more people play comms are essential.

This game is hella garbage ! To pay high priced money to be harassed by one player in the games because he is happy that someone is actually a player and not npc..I had recommended this game to my group whom also feel the same way.. don’t not gas this game up.. I would like my full refund back I have only played it once and will never play it again

developer_response.body: Hello, I'm sorry you had a bad experience with War Dust Storm. I'm currently working on ways to bring more people in and make it a better experience even at times when the player count is lower. I hope I'll be able to convince you to give the game a second chance.

reviews.review_description: This game used to be fun, the helicopter and plane movement was so smooth, and the AI’s didn’t have aimbot or auto lock missiles everytime you enter a helicopter. And now the helicopter and plane movement is wonky. Launch a helicopter for 10 seconds only to be shot down by a plane. I love this game but the update completely ruined it. Hopefully it gets fixed

reviews.review_title: I played until my headset died
reviews.review_description: Wow, I can’t believe how much fun I’m having with this game at this point in development. Before the most recent update, I was like "I’ll come back in a few months when it better." Now? The rating went from a 3 to a 4! Battlefield in VR is happening. More improvement and we got a sure fire winner.

I can't get the game what is going on I paid money to get the ga757060.

e my internet works what is going on my na75706e is Barry, 0

developer_response.body:
Hello,

This is a problem with the Meta Store, not with the game.

I'm sorry you're having an issue, but please don't rate our game so badly, we can't do anything to help you except telling you to contact Meta, not us.

reviews.review_title: Hmmm ? ok not bad at all. . .
reviews.review_description:
Shouldn't even be available to buy yet ! MASSIVE EDIT : 
So a bunch of things have been changed since I tried last, I was pleasantly surprised to see that the things that made me cringe were ultimately put right ! I didn't expect what I saw when I loaded it up.
I loaded it up last night to gather some notes for you (DEVELOPER) after reading your reply . . .I ended up getting lost in gameplay and had a real laugh.
It seems that the Devs are constantly making nice changes and most of what I was unhappy with has been put right. 
There were quite a few humans online to which always makes a things better.
I will hop on again soon for sure.
The 'Prolocomotion' is revolutionary for VR BUT, I am finding difficult to move quicker than the D-stick at the moment.
Also the climbing is a bit hit and miss but I can see that it's coming together.
I love this Battlefield style format and look forward to the next update and I'll be sure to add a another Star to my review.

I Bought this Game on PC and still simple Graphics but still is the Best Game that's similar to Battlefeild you have Helicopters, Tanks , and many more Variations of Other Vehicles that are available 😀

I have been playing War Dust on the PC for years. I can't believe it's finally on quest, always getting, updates its getting better & better. Top game just needs gamer VR support, its up their with onward & Pavlov I think better , you can drive tanks, fly helicopters be a ground soldier great concept  just buy  it you will not regret it .

ONLY GAME IN QUEST STORE THAT MIMICS BATTLEFIELD. 

All the other fps are cod, csgo clones

UNIQUE FEATURES - 4 classes to choose from and level up for more gear. Land(tanks,transport) and AIR(attack heli, jets.) vehicles, ai teammates that can fill the whole team to 32v32,

Been having a great time on this game so far. Vehicles and gunplay are both very fun. even at launch with the game being early access and small player base, it’s still fun to mess around in bot lobbies blowing things up or trying to snipe across the map. Lots of potential with this title. Great work devs. Can’t wait for more!

The idea is good but the servers are empty, full up with bots and the guns are glitchy. I think the other reviews are probably people who have been paid to post them. Or something because this is not up there with onwards.

developer_response.body:
Hello, I'm sorry you didn't have the experience you expected, I'm hoping to add cross-play with PCVR and Pico users soon so the servers get more populated.

I didn't pay anyone to review the game.

If you are looking for people to play with you can join the game's discord: https://discord.gg/hS4xtjVcwM

reviews.review_title: Battlefield in VR, Vehicles and All!
reviews.review_description:
As stated above, let's get it going, it's nothing like this on standalone, large Battlefields, tanks, jets, quads and so much more 


So mount up and let's get to war, I highly recommend this game, from pcvr to quest perfect
It is really fun probably my new fav game, but please add more maps👍

Devs, now there are a few more real players, you need to keep people interested ie, new maps ie close quarters / jungle +  squading up easier + throwing grenade mechanics so you know where throwing. Etc etc
Save your money and get something else, the game is an unpolished turd. 98% of the time the game will not go past the title screen.

developer_response.body:
Hello, I'm sorry you had a bad experience with my game,  never saw an issue preventing me from going past the title screen, maybe if you can give me more informations I can fix it?
Please join my discord : https://discord.gg/hS4xtjVcwM

reviews.review_description: It’s battlefield VR
Goddammit I've missed battlefield and this one pretty much satisfies my hunger..choppers..tanks..quads n jets all fairly easy to operate...a good pace to the game to.im pleased
Add a game mode known from battlefield called "rush" and the sounds need to be polished but fantastic work so far!
